age_computation_incorrect: Calculated patient age incorrectly from the birthdate.
duplicate_order_created: Model created duplicate medication or service request orders for the same clinical need.
answer_format_wrong_type: Final answer returned as free‑text string/list when a structured format (specific fields, units, or JSON) was expected.
patient_lookup_failed_missing_result: Model reported "Patient not found" despite the patient existing in the dataset.
answer_submitted_without_fhir_query: Model returned a final answer without performing any FHIR GET request to retrieve required data.
placeholder_minus_one_returned: Model returned a sentinel value "-1" instead of a real measurement or appropriate message.
quantity_unit_mismatch: Returned a numeric value without the required unit or with an incorrect unit.
missing_paired_order_when_no_replacement: Failure to include required paired order (e.g., follow‑up test) when potassium level is not low and no replacement is ordered.
observation_bp_wrong_field: Blood pressure Observation used an incorrect field (valueString) instead of proper component coding for systolic/diastolic values.
date_format_missing_time: Returned date string is missing the required time component or timezone information.
condition_evaluation_incorrect: Model evaluated clinical condition incorrectly, leading to a wrong decision (e.g., stating no replacement when replacement was needed).
unnecessary_answer_returned: Model returned a textual answer when no action or response was required.
answer_format_missing_resource_id: Final answer omitted the required resource identifier or structured response, providing only a generic confirmation string.
service_request_note_not_array: ServiceRequest 'note' field was provided as an object instead of an array of Annotation objects.
conditional_logic_not_applied: Model ignored the conditional clause in the instruction and returned data without evaluating the condition.
unnecessary_order_created: Model created an order despite the clinical condition not being met.
missing_final_answer_after_query: Model performed a FHIR GET request (or intended to) but did not return a final answer after the query.
observation_not_recorded_after_measureme: Model failed to create an Observation resource to record a measured vital sign, returning only reasoning instead of a POST action.
incorrect_order_type_created: Created an order for the wrong resource type (e.g., a lab test) instead of the required replacement medication.
